company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators.
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform providing AI-powered automated video editing tools for YouTubers, Instagram creators, and TikTokers.

policies.details: No refunds after 7 days of purchase. Refund requests within the first 7 days will be processed in full.
24/7 live support is available exclusively for Pro Plan subscribers. Basic Plan users receive email support within 48 hours.

pricing_faq.question: Is there a free trial?
pricing_faq.answer: Yes, AutoStream offers a 7-day free trial on the Pro Plan. No credit card required.

pricing_faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade?
pricing_faq.answer: Yes, you can switch plans anytime. Changes take effect next billing cycle.

features_detail.description: Auto-generates accurate captions with 95%+ accuracy. Supports 20+ languages.
AI detects silences and filler words and removes them automatically.
Export in full 4K resolution. Basic Plan is capped at 720p.
